summary: This document is a company one-pager describing KeepMeCompany's AI phone platform designed for NHS GP practices and elderly care. It outlines the regulatory compliance status, the specific problems regarding administrative burden and language barriers, and the projected impact on consultation efficiency. Contact details for the CEO are included at the bottom of the page.
